h4eb5318dga2d4g42d7g940fgf50a18ed03e1: Rider - my time is short. Lead me to...
hc4331ad5g25bcg4f20g8634g7430d08bf50f: Were I not merciful, I would slice the skin clean from your meat.
h38603060g8c99g4736g8517gab215b996ff5: Yet you are not bleeding. For I am nothing if not merciful.
h245392b5g7ad9g4022ga864gf72d00dc96cc: A ghaik vessel has fallen from the sky, Lae'zel. Thieves aboard have taken a weapon most precious.
h51073f3dg0a51g4d9cg8c36gfe8aa93f12c6: It is polyhedric in shape, and inscripted with the sacred runes of our people.
h1be5ab00g6f48g40fag8210g37c05892a419: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon that Voss seeks is the same one the Absolute's followers are hunting - it's the artefact that she carries.*
h31f76145g5f90g4607ga96eg33e697b79a6f: *Her mind focuses - the giths' suspicion cannot be aroused. They cannot discover that the weapon they seek is right within their grasp.*
h0fd5de3bg3791g4996gad9bg4a9f615965f2: Take word to your crèche. You are to join our search.
h016711cbgc86dg479cg86deg757faac8a23c: Speak up, child. Affirm your mandate.
h25a1aac0gf3f3g4c41g80e5g7fbbfeb2200e: Chk. My mandate - honoured Kith'rak - is to locate this crèche. I was infected aboard a ghaik ship and need to be purified. Your mandate is to aid me.
h57223fdfgddb9g4fd1gbfa4g11ba618b60ab: Purified? Soon, your skin will go grey, and your blood will run silver. You will shed your skin to become ghaik.
h9b38375eg1cc6g4217g8bf2ge2ceb35b8afd: Only in death are the infected cleansed. But... you were on the nautiloid. You possess what I seek.
h72a46154gcecfg40eag83e6g7dd43cb1154b: You will give it to us. Then you will bend your head for the sword.
hf7749fffga6d0g460dgb9e3g2d8b50758e29: Stand down, knight. I do not have what you seek!
ha31bac1ag0432g4c0ega499g3f766fd57798: Baretha, see that her skull is split and the tadpole crushed. Then examine her corpse. I will take word to the others - our quest has ended.
hfc34d038geba9g422ag916cgb94ca89b6c94: Mouth a silent command to Lae'zel: 'play along'.
h94eba452g7783g4a83ga8d5g31a4c5388d78: You honour me with this duty, Kith'rak. I shall alert my caretaker with haste.
hed566085g2237g440cg9a78g3db74e78f6ed: *The Kith'rak nods, content with Lae'zel's answer.*
hd1927802g4fb0g4cecg903ag593862c155af: You serve your Queen well, child. Take your slaves, and hunt those who escaped the ghaik ship. They must carry the weapon.
hecff1fcdg01acg4e21gaeb4gf16769ac4cba: Vlaakith will see your faith rewarded in this plane and ours.
hdc1732c3g8fd6g467fg8b40ge6ccaff8c926: You serve your Queen well, child. Hunt those who escaped the ghaik ship. Find the weapon.
h8c1dccc3g8949g4026g8ce4gbcf8384ede51: Lae'zel. Child. Your lies sting. Has Vlaakith not demanded better?
hff691701g8d44g44f8g88aege79d4f7f8bad: Vlaakith demands my purity, Kith'rak. I was infected aboard a ghaik ship. By protocol you must aid me.
h26dd2fc8g4d00g4e7bgba44g93714615ba50: You were on the Nautiloid? Our thieves come forth, Baretha. Did you imagine such fortune?
h6626fc60g37b3g44ddg88e7g84a869372e81: You will give us the weapon. Then you will bend your head for the sword.
h9ae2aa0bg7bf2g4dc5g884ega5e2f8acaab2: Baretha, see that her skull is split and the weapon collected, on Vlaakith's command. I will take word to the others - our quest has ended.
he13c08ecge4ceg4aabgb49dgfa99d4950a81: Produce the odd artefact. You're looking for this, I take it?
h1217fcdfg9957g4f65ga8acge887e3183d7a: Our thieves come forth, Baretha. Did you imagine such fortune?
haa8ea970g32f0g46a2g9ae2g1c14a7ecf247: You will give us the weapon. Then you will bend your head for the sword.
h99c80504gd866g4bc4g8251gf7cac31a3112: I have done no wrong. Vlaakith demands my purity, Kith'rak. I was infected aboard the ghaik ship. By protocol, you must aid me.
h122d7268g14adg49d0g8040g8726f5b6ddab: Baretha, see that her skull is split and the weapon collected. I will take word to the others - our quest has ended.
hbc256911g0e9fg4215g95deg83e9542fb219: Your death is at hand, traitor!
h1e8aeaa6g345dg49d2gac8bgd35502db829d: I have my own mandate. Time to die, gith.
hd6f1d80dga07fg4853g9f34g0da5e5b872e4: What? Halfwit! I have not suffered for you to deny me!
hbb85ac80g01e8g4742gb0e0ge25cfd45c613: You do not control your slaves?
h94360c06g0a4fg4393ga3bcg6ed5a9edc4cb: Baretha - see their skulls split and their corpses examined, on Vlaakith's command.
hb6119707gac41g4262g9462g4c0a5ba52434: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon that Voss seeks - it's the artefact that she carries.*
h060176b7g1fe6g49d9g8165gd0ca8eebf64e: *You realise that the weapon Voss speaks of is the gith artefact you carry. You must keep it from him, same as you must keep it from the Absolute.*
hf4c43a82g637eg45a9gb8cagd0d985fa0508: *You realise that the weapon Voss speaks of is the gith artefact you carry. You cannot let him discover it - not matter what.*
h0e3f8094g99c8g4af3ga78agb1f3c1eda291: *You suddenly feel a strange anxiety take hold - not your own, but that of the artefact you carry. Somehow, it's afraid...*
h7ddbe884g39adg443eg882cg93246ca17c1f: *You attune your mind to it. The artefact does not want to fall into the gith raiders' hands any more than it does the Absolute followers'.*
h5232c5e1g74eag417fgacaeg8f84011e0ae5: *You attune your mind to it. The artefact does not not want to part from you. It does not want to fall into the gith raiders' hands.*
h85bd6684g5825g482cgae55gae7c6e6d622c: I will be speaking on my kin's behalf, Kith'rak.
h38050d66gb084g4f2agb816gd405f1d7263c: Now, now - Vlaakith esteems all her children. What say you, githyanki?
hc40d3cf0g0c1bg4dbegbe16gf3916b14cada: Now, now - I would hear from all dwellers of remote planes. What say you?
h8a7f8678gbc80g4da7gac99gb24324156047: Now, now - I've few chances to speak to such an unusual sort. What say you?
h6026ada6gd662g4c9dg99a9ga249d7cf5e58: I will be speaking on her behalf, gith.
h0b6ed6aag034bg47a8g83b3g6274257e0196: I will be speaking on her behalf, gith.
